Explanation: All three agents independently identified Balming Tiger as the group that fits all the criteria: formed between 2015-2018, first mixtape in 2018, 11 members in February 2023, and released the album "January Never Dies" (14 tracks, less than 15, with only two featured artists) between 2020 and 2023. Multiple sources confirm that the music video for "Moving Forward" was released on the same day as the album (October 19, 2023) [76586]. The evidence is consistent and directly answers the question.
Exact Answer: Moving Forward
Confidence: 100%
